ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., US, UK) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 2-3, 4-5) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the measurement belongs to */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor to convert measurements to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of clothing item (e.g., tops, bottoms, dresses) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Primary address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, designer, customer service representative) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
